# Panos Antoniou Weddings — Makeup, Hair & Wedding Planning

> Luxury bridal makeup, hair styling, and bespoke wedding planning in Santorini, Mykonos, Athens, and worldwide. Founded by Panos Antoniou, a beauty industry leader with 25+ years of experience and a former MAC Cosmetics Pro Team member.

Panos Antoniou Weddings is a Santorini-based luxury wedding atelier serving international couples since 2010. The company provides on-site bridal beauty (makeup and hair), full wedding planning and coordination, and curated combined experiences that merge both. In 2026 the brand launched the first exclusive Bridal Lounge & Makeup Studio in Santorini, a private high-end space for bridal preparation and editorial photoshoots.

**Owner:** Panagiotis Asteriou Antoniou (ΑΦΜ 108858849, ΔΟΥ Θήρας, Αρ. ΓΕΜΗ 193542738000)
**Phone:** +30 6955 628019 (WhatsApp) / +30 22860 22940 (Office)
**Email:** events@weddingsmakeupandhair.com
**Studio:** Pyrgos Village, Santorini, Greece
**Languages:** English, Ελληνικά (Greek)

## Services

- [Bridal Makeup & Hair](https://www.weddingsmakeupandhair.com/services/bridal-beauty): Full Bridal Beauty (€560), trials, pre/next-day styling, bridal party group packages up to 20 people, same-sex wedding packages (Double Bridal Glow, Groomed & Polished), and Photoshoot styling for editorial sessions.
- [Wedding Planning & Coordination](https://www.weddingsmakeupandhair.com/services/wedding-planning): Full Planning for Intimate Weddings (up to 30 guests) and Grand Celebrations (up to 100 guests). Elopement packages (Essential €7,700, Premium €9,700), Proposal design (€4,500–€6,900), Sailing Experience (€6,900). All packages include vendor management, venue scouting, budget management, and on-day coordination. Starting from €2,000.
- [The Combined Experience](https://www.weddingsmakeupandhair.com/services): A bespoke fusion of bridal beauty and wedding planning into one seamless engagement. Starting from €2,000.
- [The Bridal Lounge & Makeup Studio](https://www.weddingsmakeupandhair.com/bridal-lounge): Private bridal preparation studio in Pyrgos, Santorini. Studio services include Private Bridal Preparation (€450), Bridal Boudoir Studio Use (€60/hr), Professional Makeup Lessons (€150).

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.weddingsmakeupandhair.com/): Overview of services and the Panos Antoniou brand.
- [About](https://www.weddingsmakeupandhair.com/about): Founder bio and career milestones (MAC Cosmetics Pro Team 2001, Athens 2004 Olympic Games, Balenciaga Mykonos 2008, founded Panos Antoniou Weddings 2010, Bridal Lounge 2026).
- [Portfolio](https://www.weddingsmakeupandhair.com/portfolio): Over 60 curated wedding and editorial images from Santorini, Mykonos, and beyond.
- [Booking Terms](https://www.weddingsmakeupandhair.com/booking-terms): 30% deposit for makeup/hair, 40% deposit for planning. Cancellation policy, payment methods (PayPal, Revolut, IRIS, bank transfer, card, cash), travel fees, team assignment.
- [Contact](https://www.weddingsmakeupandhair.com/contact): Inquiry form for booking. Studio reachable via WhatsApp +30 6955 628019.
- [Blog](https://www.weddingsmakeupandhair.com/blog): Editorial articles on Santorini weddings, bridal beauty, and wedding planning advice.

## Service Area

Primary: Santorini (Σαντορίνη), Greece.
Also serving: Mykonos, Athens, mainland Greece, and worldwide destinations on request.

## Brand Recognition

- Founded by Panos Antoniou in 2010.
- Operating the first exclusive Bridal Lounge & Makeup Studio in Santorini (since 2026).
- Featured in magazine covers, television productions, fashion shows, TV commercials.
- Past credits include Star Hellas & Miss Hellas (2001–2006), Athens 2004 Olympic Games, Balenciaga Mykonos boutique.
